name: appointment-saas
description: Phase 1 foundation for the appointment booking SaaS platform.

scripts.db:init:auth: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U appointment_saas -d appointment_saas_dev < apps/api/db/phase-2-auth.sql
scripts.db:init:tenants: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U appointment_saas -d appointment_saas_dev < apps/api/db/phase-3-tenant-model.sql
scripts.db:init:memberships: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U appointment_saas -d appointment_saas_dev < apps/api/db/iteration-2-business-memberships.sql
scripts.db:init:services: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U appointment_saas -d appointment_saas_dev < apps/api/db/iteration-3-services.sql
scripts.db:init:staff: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U appointment_saas -d appointment_saas_dev < apps/api/db/iteration-4-staff.sql
scripts.db:init:appointments: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U appointment_saas -d appointment_saas_dev < apps/api/db/iteration-5-appointments.sql
